name: AnthropicConnector
description: Connects to the Anthropic (Claude) REST API: Messages, token counting, Models, Message Batches, and Files (beta). API-key auth via x-api-key + anthropic-version headers. Sync is a documented no-op — Anthropic is an inference surface, not a document source.

install_fields.label: Anthropic API Key
install_fields.help: From Console → Settings → API Keys → Create Key. Sent in the x-api-key header on every request (NOT as a Bearer token).

install_fields.label: Anthropic API Base URL
install_fields.help: Override for staging proxies or regional endpoints. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Anthropic API Version
install_fields.help: Date-pinned API version sent in the mandatory anthropic-version header. Leave at the default unless you specifically need a newer pin.

install_fields.label: Per-Request Timeout (s)
install_fields.help: httpx per-request timeout in seconds. Raise above 60 for long Messages completions with high max_tokens.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Client-side soft cap. The HTTP client paces outbound requests to stay under this budget. Default is 50.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates api_key and marks the connector installed. Does NOT call the API.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: No-op for api_key auth — returns TokenInfo(access_token=api_key) for ABI compatibility.

apis.name: Sync (no-op)
apis.description: Documented no-op. Anthropic is an inference API, not a document source.

apis.name: Create Message
apis.description: POST /messages — create a Claude chat completion.

apis.name: Count Tokens
apis.description: POST /messages/count_tokens — estimate input-token cost before sending.

apis.name: List Models
apis.description: GET /models — list models available to this api key.

apis.name: Get Model
apis.description: GET /models/{id} — fetch a single model's metadata.

apis.name: Create Message Batch
apis.description: POST /messages/batches — submit a Message Batch for async processing.

apis.name: List Batches
apis.description: GET /messages/batches — list all batches submitted by this api key.

apis.name: Get Batch Results
apis.description: GET /messages/batches/{id}/results — fetch results of a completed batch (JSONL).

apis.name: List Files (beta)
apis.description: GET /files — list uploaded files (beta header anthropic-beta: files-api-2025-04-14).
